entries.title: Stripe Webhook Idempotency Key Visualizer
entries.notes: Hook into Chrome devtools network panel on dashboard.stripe.com, parse webhook logs, and overlay idempotency key reuse patterns. Strong buildability with the existing Stripe CLI and a side panel UI. No competitor visualizes this specifically; most teams grep JSON.
entries.pain: Developers can't tell when a retried Stripe webhook will be treated as a duplicate vs new, leading to lost revenue events.

entries.title: LinkedIn Comment Thread Velocity Pulse
entries.notes: Inject into linkedin.com feed/posts, classify comment authors (1st-degree, employee, influencer) and track velocity in the first 6 hours. Sidebar overlay shows a 'lead heat' score. Differentiates from comment sentiment trackers by surfacing author identity, not just tone.
entries.pain: AEs cannot tell which posts by prospects are gaining real engagement vs bot comments, missing warm signal for outreach.

entries.title: Vercel Build Cache Hit Rate Inspector
entries.notes: Reads vercel.com build logs via the page DOM, parses cache events, and shows a per-project cache hit ratio with culprits. Buildable in a weekend using DOM scraping plus a small IndexedDB store. No first-party Vercel UI shows this rollup.
entries.pain: Engineers don't know which Vercel builds are busting the cache and burning build minutes unnecessarily.

entries.title: Gong Call Pricing Mention Extractor
entries.notes: Pull transcripts from app.gong.io, regex-match competitor product names plus currency/percent patterns, and pin a sidebar of mentions per deal. Highly monetizable per-seat to RevOps teams. Differentiates from generic call summary tools by focusing on competitive intel specifically.
entries.pain: RevOps wants to know how often competitors' pricing comes up on calls but reps never tag it in Gong.

entries.title: Browser Cookie SameSite Policy Auditor
entries.notes: Uses chrome.cookies API plus devtools Application panel overlay to flag SameSite, Secure, and third-party context per cookie. Buildable in a few days using existing APIs. Fills a gap DevTools shows cookies but never audits their security posture in aggregate.
entries.pain: QA engineers can't quickly see which cookies a site sets with SameSite=None vs default and which will break in cross-site flows.

entries.title: Calendly Routing Rule Fairness Visualizer
entries.notes: Scrapes calendly.com/event_types admin pages, computes assigned-meeting distribution per rep over selectable windows. Sidebar chart highlights variance and outliers. No native Calendly admin view exposes this skew; positioned for sales ops.
entries.pain: Sales managers can't prove round-robin distribution is actually balanced across reps after manual reassignments.

entries.title: Local RAG Chunk Quality Side Panel
entries.notes: Detects pages with embedded vector stores (common in LangChain/llamaindex demos) and injects a panel showing retrieval scores per chunk with a relevance toggle. Why now: local RAG stacks exploded 2025-26 and there is no good in-browser debugger. Single dev, ~3 weeks build.
entries.pain: Engineers building local RAG on private docs can't tell which chunks their retriever surfaces are actually relevant.

entries.title: AWS IAM Policy Blast Radius Calculator
entries.notes: Parses IAM policy JSON when opened in console.aws.amazon.com, walks action wildcards against the AWS service catalog, and shows a service count plus data-plane risk badge. Buildable by scraping console JSON with manifest V3 content scripts. Direct competitor gap: IAM Access Analyzer only flags within-account issues, not service breadth.
entries.pain: Platform engineers can't quickly judge whether a new IAM policy grants access to more services than intended.

entries.title: Cold Email Domain Blacklist Pre-Flight
entries.notes: When composing in Gmail/Outlook web, runs the From domain against DNSBL lists in the background and shows a warning chip before send. Why now: Gmail tightened bulk sender rules again in 2026, so domain reputation is hot. Quota model suits heavy SDR teams.
entries.pain: Outbound reps hit spam folders without warning because their sending domain is already on a blocklist they never checked.

entries.title: Browser Tab Focus Score by Domain
entries.notes: Uses chrome.tabs + chrome.idle to bucket time per domain, lets user tag each domain as 'deep work', 'shallow', or 'distraction', and outputs a daily focus ratio. Buildable in <2 weeks with extension APIs only. Differs from existing screen-time blockers by being diagnostic, not punitive.
entries.pain: Knowledge workers can't tell which domains actually drive their output versus which just drain attention during the day.

entries.title: Supabase Edge Function Latency Heatmap
entries.notes: Parses the Supabase dashboard logs panel and reconstructs cold-start vs warm latency per function across regions. Side panel overlay with heatmap. Why now: Supabase crossed 5M projects in 2026 and observability is still weak. Clean solo build using DOM scraping.
entries.pain: Developers using Supabase Edge Functions don't have a per-region latency view to know where to colocate reads.

entries.title: HubSpot Email Open Time by Industry Heatmap
entries.notes: Reads app.hubspot.com marketing reports, groups contacts by industry, and renders a 7x24 heatmap of opens and clicks. Per-seat pitch to marketing ops managers. Differentiator: HubSpot itself shows aggregate heatmaps but never segmented by ICP.
entries.pain: Marketing ops can't tell which industries engage with nurture emails at which hour, so send-time defaults are guesses.

entries.title: Webpage Form Field Autofill Privacy Scanner
entries.notes: Watches for off-screen, zero-opacity, and CSS-hidden inputs on any form page and labels them with a privacy warning badge. Pure DOM inspection, no network needed. Why now: privacy regulation is tightening globally and form-based scraping is widespread. Tip jar fits solo dev model.
entries.pain: Users don't realize how many invisible autofill honeypot fields are harvesting data when they paste into forms.

entries.title: Linear Issue Priority Aging Visualizer
entries.notes: Hooks linear.app views via DOM scraping, colors issues by days-since-priority-set vs current priority, surfaces a per-cycle SLA breach list. Buildable in ~2 weeks. No native Linear dashboard shows priority-versus-age scatter; this is a familiar pattern from incident review tools.
entries.pain: Engineering leads can't see when a P1 Linear issue has been sitting too long without triage or close.

entries.title: Notion AI Block Cost Attribution Sidebar
entries.notes: Monitors Notion AI usage events fired in the page, attributes each invocation to a block type and a page, and shows a credit burn leaderboard in a sidebar. Bridges a known Notion pain point that the official UI only gives a single monthly number. Solo build ~3 weeks using injected content scripts and local aggregation.
entries.pain: Notion power users can't tell which AI blocks in their workspace are burning through their monthly AI credits.
